# Bait Boards Direct

> Premium bait boards and fishing tackle accessories for serious anglers across Australia.

> Extended version: [llms-full.txt](https://www.baitboardsdirect.com/llms-full.txt)
> Last updated: 2026-05-06
> License: RSL-1.0

## About

Bait Boards Direct supplies high-quality bait boards, rod holders, and fishing accessories for Australian recreational and professional anglers. All products are designed for durability in marine environments.

## Contact

- Website: https://www.baitboardsdirect.com

- [Home](https://www.baitboardsdirect.com/)
- [All Products](https://www.baitboardsdirect.com/products)
- [Contact](https://www.baitboardsdirect.com/contact)
